OmniScript.description: Everyone has unique superpowers. This quick snapshot helps you discover yours and build on what you do best. 💪
OmniScript.name: Your Strengths Snapshot 💪

omniProcessElements.name: NavigateAction1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "NavigateAction1", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Named Page", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%ContextId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : false, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "targetName" : "career-planning-and-life-goals" }

omniProcessElements.name: Save-Responses
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Save", "remoteClass" : "DiscoveryFrmwrk.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3.0, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3.0, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: Describe_yourself
New_topic_learnings
Surprise_project_reaction
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "When a professor throws a surprise project at you with a tight deadline, how do you react internally?", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "hide" : false, "lwcName" : "runtime_industries_assessment__icon-response", "bStandalone" : false, "customAttributes" : [ ], "designerElementName" : "", "iconOptions" : [ { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyAx5", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTBk", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Energised by the pressure", "iconResponseValue" : 5, "displayOrder" : 5 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyAx1", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTJi", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Stressed", "iconResponseValue" : 1, "displayOrder" : 1 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyAx2", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTE1", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Concerned but start planning immediately", "iconResponseValue" : 2, "displayOrder" : 2 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyAx3", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTEw", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "It is what it is", "iconResponseValue" : 3, "displayOrder" : 3 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyAx4", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTBh", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Okay, a new challenge!!!", "iconResponseValue" : 4, "displayOrder" : 4 } ] }

childElements.name: Team_Collaboration
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "How much do you enjoy working as part of a team?", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "hide" : false, "lwcName" : "runtime_industries_assessment__icon-response", "bStandalone" : false, "customAttributes" : [ ], "designerElementName" : "", "iconOptions" : [ { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyB05", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTBk", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Big team player", "iconResponseValue" : 5, "displayOrder" : 5 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyB01", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTFl", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Not at all", "iconResponseValue" : 1, "displayOrder" : 1 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyB02", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTEw", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Not a fan", "iconResponseValue" : 2, "displayOrder" : 2 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyB03", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTE1", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Indifferent", "iconResponseValue" : 3, "displayOrder" : 3 }, { "uniqueIndex" : "0lFWs000000IyB04", "iconUnicode" : "XHVkODNkXHVkZTBj", "iconImage" : null, "iconLabel" : "Love it", "iconResponseValue" : 4, "displayOrder" : 4 } ] }

childElements.name: Team_Project_Process

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Your Strengths Snapshot", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Save", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
